reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The output document is missing a massive portion of the source content. The JSON contains a literal string in the 'sections' array that states: '_omitted': '42 sections omitted for token budget'. This indicates that approximately 42 sections, covering pages 4, 7-12, 14-48, and parts of others, were silently dropped during the conversion process. This is a catastrophic failure of content fidelity.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains 61 pages of comprehensive contract terms, technical specifications (Section C), and general terms (Section G).

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent. Major document sections such as 'Section A' (element 17) and 'Section B' (element 27) are assigned H2 levels. However, 'Attachment A' (element 352), 'Attachment F' (element 419), and 'Attachment G' (element 427) are promoted to H1. This results in a broken logical structure where subordinate attachments are at a higher level than the primary document sections.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Section A (Page 3), Section B (Page 5), Attachment A (Page 49).
concerns.output_quote: Section A (reading_order 17, level 2); Section B (reading_order 27, level 2); Attachment A (reading_order 352, level 1).

concerns.analysis: There are multiple failures in table structure conversion. 1) In Attachment D, Table D.3 (element 397) and Table D.4 (element 400), the table titles were merged into the header row of the table itself, which shifts the actual column headers into the body of the table. 2) In Attachment B, the single logical table for General Specifications is split into two separate tables (elements 371 and 374) because of a page break, and row GS22 is split between them mid-sentence.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Table D.3 title above the table (Page 57); GS22 row content (Page 52-53).
concerns.output_quote: Element 397 row 1 contains title 'Table D.3...'; GS22 text split between element 371 ('... Catalogs (if an') and 374 ('online catalog is not available...').

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: The output contains a significant numerical error in Attachment B. In row SR6, the source document specifies a minimum sales volume of '$50,000,000'. The output document incorrectly lists this figure as '$10,000,000'. This error changes the fundamental eligibility requirement for vendors.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Per Section C, Subsection 25, Vendor shall provide evidence that it has a minimum sales volume of $50,000,000 of IT Infrastructure Solutions...
concerns.output_quote: Per Section C, Subsection 25, Vendor shall provide evidence that it has a minimum sales volume of $10,000,000 of IT Infrastructure Solutions...
concerns.location: sections[8], table for Attachment B, row SR6

concerns.analysis: Multiple URLs and email addresses visible in the source document (e.g., debbie.patterson@nc.gov on page 1, various .gov links on pages 5 and 7) are converted as plain text without being identified as functional, clickable links in the JSON content structure.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
